description: Create supplemental.pl AI tools page in Polish describing AI-powered food law tools with CTA linking to FOODLAW.ai. Emphasizes speed, confidence/experience, and competitive prices through AI mastery. No inflated statistics.
steps: Create website/src/pages/supplemental.astro - a dedicated Polish-language page for supplemental.pl AI tools section
Content must include: description of AI-powered food law tools (automated legal research, regulatory monitoring, document analysis), clear CTA button linking to FOODLAW.ai main page

Messaging pillars: (1) speed of action - szybkosc dzialania, AI processes regulations instantly; (2) confidence/experience - pewnosc i doswiadczenie, 15+ years of food law expertise combined with AI; (3) very competitive prices - konkurencyjne ceny dzieki opanowaniu technologii AI

Must NOT include any inflated numbers like '500+ firms' or '500+ audits'. Use only verifiable claims: 15+ lat doswiadczenia (from README), 19+ obszarow prawa zywnosciowego (from skills count), ponad 20 rozporzadzen UE (from README table)
Apply consistent styling with the main landing page (same Tailwind config, same color palette, same layout system)
Add link to this page from the main footer component
acceptance_criteria: Contains CTA button/link pointing to the main FOODLAW.ai page
Messaging covers: speed, confidence/experience, competitive AI-driven pricing
No unverifiable statistics or inflated numbers present in the content
Page is accessible from the footer of the main landing page
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/foodlaw.ai/website && pnpm build` and confirm the supplemental page is in dist/ output
